page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program for faster and efficient alignment for short oligonucleotide onto reference sequences. SOAPaligner/soap2 is compatible with numerous applications, including single-read or pair-end resequencing.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program for faster and efficient alignment for short oligonucleotide onto reference sequences. SOAPaligner/soap2 is compatible with numerous applications, including single-read or pair-end resequencing.
